commands.command: re-review after adding redacted windows 6.1 doctor --fix proof to the pr body
commands.freeform_prompt: after adding redacted Windows 6.1 doctor --fix proof to the PR body.

target.title: fix: route agent command replies through reply hooks
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes agent-command durable final delivery so recovered/main-session replies carry `reply_payload_sending` hook metadata into the existing outbound send path.
- Lets channel plugins that rely on `reply_payload_sending` observe, rewrite, cancel, or fallback-deliver recovered agent replies instead of missing them.
- Keeps recovery events, plugin API shape, session schema, and delivery queue schema unchanged.

## Linked context

Closes #90282.

Related #90282.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: restart-recovered agent-command final replies now pass replayable `reply_payload_sending` hook metadata into durable outbound delivery before the outbound adapter receives the payload.
- Real environment tested: Windows local OpenClaw checkout at PR head `445bb4a60`, Node v26.1.0, isolated temporary `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` and `OPENCLAW_HOME`. The run exercised the real `deliverAgentCommandResult -> sendDurableMessageBatch -> deliverOutboundPayloadsInternal -> reply_payload_sending -> direct outbound adapter` runtime path with a local direct Slack channel adapter.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: from `D:\project\openclaw`, ran `node_modules\.bin\tsx.cmd %TEMP%\openclaw-pr90300-proof-...\proof.mts`. The script registered a `reply_payload_sending` hook, delivered one agent-command reply to `slack/#proof`, and printed the payload received by the outbound adapter.
- Evidence after fix:

```text
proof: deliveryStatus=sent deliverySucceeded=true
proof: hookCalls=1
proof: hookKind=final hookChannel=slack hookSession=agent:tester:slack:direct:alice hookRun=run-proof-1
proof: hookContext={"channelId":"slack","accountId":"workspace-1","conversationId":"#proof","sessionKey":"agent:tester:slack:direct:alice","runId":"run-proof-1"}
proof: deliveredText=hooked: final answer
proof: deliveredTo=#proof deliveredChannel=slack
proof: isolatedStateDir=true
```

- Observed result after fix: delivery completed with `deliveryStatus=sent`; the hook ran once for the `final` payload with channel/session/run context; the outbound adapter received `hooked: final answer`, proving the delivered reply was the hook-mutated payload.
- What was not tested: a live gateway restart with external Slack/Discord credentials was not run in this local environment.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: this is local runtime proof for the OpenClaw delivery/hook/outbound path. It does not prove third-party transport delivery after a full gateway process restart.
- Before evidence: the added regression first failed before implementation because durable delivery args had `replyPayloadSendingHook` as `undefined`.

## Tests and validation

- `node_modules\.bin\tsx.cmd %TEMP%\openclaw-pr90300-proof-...\proof.mts`
- `node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config test\vitest\vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts --maxWorkers=1 --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.cmd --check src\agents\command\delivery.ts src\agents\command\delivery.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/command/delivery.ts src/agents/command/delivery.test.ts`
- `npx -y pnpm@11.2.2 tsgo:core:test`
- `python .agents\skills\autoreview\scripts\autoreview --mode local`

Regression coverage added:

- Added `deliverAgentCommandResult` coverage asserting durable final delivery receives replayable `reply_payload_sending` hook metadata.
- Made two existing workspace-dir assertions platform-neutral with `path.resolve(...)` so the focused file passes on Windows too.

## Risk checklist

- User-visible behavior changed: yes. Recovered/main-session agent-command final replies can now run the existing `reply_payload_sending` hook path before delivery.
- Config, environment, or migration behavior changed: no.
- Security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior changed: no.
- Highest-risk area: plugin hooks now run for this agent-command durable final delivery path, matching the existing reply delivery contract.
- Mitigation: the change uses the already-supported durable outbound hook field and keeps queue/replay behavior in the existing outbound delivery layer; focused regression coverage checks the metadata passed to durable delivery.

## Current review state

- ClawSweeper code review did not identify code repair findings.
- Runtime proof above has been added for the proof gate.
- Remaining maintainer judgment: whether a full live gateway restart with external channel credentials is required beyond this local runtime delivery proof.
- Next action: CI/proof-gate re-run and maintainer review.
target.author: sweetcornna
